cognito.userpool.passwordpolicy.MinimumL.Description: The minimum length of the password in the policy that you have set. This value can't be less than 6.

cognito.userpool.passwordpolicy.RequireL.Description: In the password policy that you have set, refers to whether you have required users to use at least one lowercase letter in their password.

cognito.userpool.passwordpolicy.RequireN.Description: In the password policy that you have set, refers to whether you have required users to use at least one number in their password.

cognito.userpool.passwordpolicy.RequireS.Description: In the password policy that you have set, refers to whether you have required users to use at least one symbol in their password.

cognito.userpool.passwordpolicy.RequireU.Description: In the password policy that you have set, refers to whether you have required users to use at least one uppercase letter in their password.

cognito.userpool.passwordpolicy.Temporar.Description: The number of days a temporary password is valid in the password policy. If the user doesn't sign in during this time, an administrator must reset their password.  When you set `TemporaryPasswordValidityDays` for a user pool, you can no longer set a value for the legacy `UnusedAccountValidityDays` parameter in that user pool.
